feature: CPM editor context-menu color value picker

checks.name: Command registration
checks.details: cpm.insertColorValue is declared in package.json activation events and commands, and registered by src/extension.ts.

checks.name: Context-menu integration
checks.details: The command is exposed under the CPM editor context menu for C/C++ files.

checks.name: Webview picker
checks.details: The webview includes native color input, RGB channels, alpha value/range, alpha preview, brightness slider, preset swatches and insert/copy actions.

checks.name: Output formats
checks.details: The picker supports #RRGGBB, 0xRRGGBB, decimal RGB integer, rgb(), rgba(), raw RGB/RGBA channel lists, SDL_Color initializer, RGB() and QColor().

checks.name: Compile
checks.details: npm run compile completed successfully after integration.
